## Add Project: [Project Name]

### Project Details

- **Website:**
- **Twitter:**
- **How does this project use x402?**

### Checklist

- [ ] Added project to `data/projects.json`
- [ ] Project ID is lowercase and hyphenated
- [ ] Description is under 100 characters
- [ ] At least one tag selected from allowed list:
  - [ ] `infrastructure` - SDKs, libraries, facilitator tooling
  - [ ] `services` - APIs, content paywalls, data feeds
  - [ ] `analytics` - Explorers, dashboards, indexers
  - [ ] `consumer` - Wallets, browser extensions, desktop apps
- [ ] Website URL is live and working

### Logo (if included)

- [ ] PNG format with transparent background
- [ ] 200x200 pixels
- [ ] Saved to `assets/logos/{project-id}.png`

### Social Links (all optional)

- [ ] `twitter` - handle without @
- [ ] `telegram` - handle or full URL
- [ ] `discord` - invite URL
- [ ] `farcaster` - warpcast handle
- [ ] `youtube` - channel URL
- [ ] `reddit` - subreddit name or URL
- [ ] `medium` - handle or URL
- [ ] `github` - org/repo format
- [ ] `docs` - documentation URL

### Facilitator (if applicable)

- [ ] `endpoint` - facilitator API URL is valid and responds
- [ ] `networks` - array of supported networks
- [ ] `x402scan` - slug matches your x402scan.com/facilitator/{slug} page

### Token (if applicable)

- [ ] `symbol` and `name` provided
- [ ] `network` is correct (`base`, `ethereum`, etc.)
- [ ] `contract_address` is valid
- [ ] `coingecko_id` verified via API (not URL slug)
- [ ] `coingecko_slug` if URL slug differs from API ID

### Notes

<!-- Any additional context about your project -->
